channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 19.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Make platforms that promote violent content pay towards riot costs, Streeting says
item.description: Make platforms that promote violent content pay towards riot costs, Streeting says

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Illegal dump becomes ‘symbol of north-south divide’ at heart of Makerfield byelection

item.title: LabourList: 'Keir Starmer's slow motion defence crisis'

item.title: Independent UK Politics: New defence secretary Dan Jarvis ‘determined’ to get armed forces ‘precisely’ what they need
